H2_weak_signal_dilution.note: I2 permuted contamination: TabM shows weak reduction; ModernNCA shows modest reduction for M05; TabR got worse (permuted harm more negative). No model shows H2 clearly. Permutation may introduce noise rather than removing signal.

H3_finite_sample_variance.note: S1 training fraction: examined 25%→100% trend. Results variable across models.

H4_optimization_early_stopping.note: O1 fixed epoch (50 epochs): effect near zero. H4 NOT SUPPORTED.

conclusion: M04/M05 negative harm is robustly replicated (CL13a PARTIALLY_CONFIRMED). However, the preregistered sentinel interventions (I2/H2, S1/H3, O1/H4) did not provide strong causal support for any single mechanism hypothesis. The phenomenon remains an unexplained cross-model regularity.
